title: Registration Now Open for 2025–26 Season!
body: Early bird pricing of $350 is available through July 15. Regular registration is $375. Sibling discounts apply. Sign up today to secure your spot — spots fill fast!

title: Referee Program Openings — HS Students Apply Now
body: 9th–12th graders can earn a cash stipend officiating Sunday games. CCOP alumni and Pleasanton residents get priority. Apply via the contact page before spots fill.

title: Season Schedule: Games Resume Jan 19
body: Games are back in action after the holiday break! Sunday afternoon matchups run through mid-February. Check with your coach for your team's specific schedule and gym location.
